message:
fix(schema): treat _results keys as objects, not arrays

The suffix heuristic in defSubmitResultWithRequiredDataKeys typed any key
ending in "s" as an array. This caused story_results to get an
array-of-strings schema instead of object, which made the LLM serialize
story results as a truncated JSON string inside an array element rather
than the structured object the prompt requested.

Exclude _results suffix from the plural-s → array rule. Add regression
test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
